name: Oregon CCB Active Licenses
updateFrequency: unknown; verify current Oregon Open Data portal metadata before relying on freshness assumptions
knownExclusions: The source name indicates active licenses; inactive, expired, suspended, historical, local, or other agency records may be excluded.
Electrical, plumbing, landscape, asbestos, and other specialized records can be regulated by separate Oregon agencies.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented yet. Prefer downloaded local files and official portal export mechanisms for future work.
publicRecordsNotes: Official open-data source metadata. Absence from this active-license source is not proof that a license does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: Oregon Open Data exposes the active-license dataset and export metadata. A future adapter should begin with a tiny hand-authored fixture.
researchNotes: Good second-wave adapter candidate, but active-only coverage must be represented clearly in verification language.
maintainerNotes: Do not present this source as complete statewide contractor licensing coverage.
